creator: wxs@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm unable to reproduce this on a -CURRENT amd64 machine.  The
environment portion of this PR indicates it is a 6.2 i386 machine.  Is
this the same machine that is exhibiting this problem?

Just to make sure, all I did was "make install clean" in the tripwire
port and entered passphrases where asked during the install.  I
shouldn't have to do anything else?

-- WXS
